title: DC AI Chat Client
hintText: Connected via DC AI Proxy. Conversation history is saved locally in your browser.

welcomeTitle: How can I help you today?
welcomeDesc: DC AI Chat is secured and optimized via Proxy Gateway.
suggest1Desc: Build modern and optimized web interface components
suggest1Prompt: Write a simple React component that displays a list of users
suggest2Desc: Generate email copy and post ideas to engage users
suggest2Prompt: Write an engaging sales email for a new SaaS software product
suggest3Desc: Simplify complex technical and scientific concepts
suggest3Prompt: Explain how Artificial Neural Networks work in simple terms
suggest4Desc: Methods to improve database query performance at scale
suggest4Prompt: How do I optimize SQL queries for large datasets?
defaultSystemPrompt: You are an AI named DC AI Assistant, a versatile and helpful assistant managed by DC AI.
privacyTermsContent:
Privacy Policy

  • Payload Privacy: All conversation payloads, messages, and files are streamed directly to the respective upstream AI providers. No chat history or prompts are logged or stored on the proxy server.
  • Metrics & Logging: The local database only stores system operational metadata: upstream keys, client keys, session keys, and aggregate metrics (success rate, token consumption, latency).

Terms of Service

  • Cost Liability: You are solely responsible for any charges incurred on the upstream keys added to the rotation pool.
  • Use at Your Own Risk: This software is provided "as is", without warranty of any kind. Authors are not responsible for account suspensions or service blocks.
confirmDeleteConversation: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?
confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this message?
landingH1: Unified Gateway for rotative LLM APIs
landingDesc: A high-performance, resilient proxy database designed to rotate API credentials, balance request traffic, and perform live protocol formatting translations for OpenAI, Gemini, and Claude.
landingCard1Desc: Ensures zero-downtime integrations by automatically rotating active upstream API keys using a fast Round-Robin lookup with automatic retry logic.
landingCard2Desc: Allows unified endpoints compatibility. Translate requests structures dynamically to matches Gemini Native and Claude protocols seamlessly.
landingCard3Desc: Verifies keys health dynamically on startup. Moves rate-limited keys into cool down states automatically and recovers them in background.
landingShowcaseDesc: Interact directly with the active rotation model pool using a sleek, glassmorphic chat client designed for modern AI interactions.
landingFeature1Desc: Beautiful, violet-bordered collapsible blocks to inspect reasoning processes from DeepSeek-R1, OpenAI o1/o3, and Gemini Thinking models.
landingFeature2Desc: Enrich prompts with up-to-date context from Tavily and Wikipedia searches, synthesized directly into the discussion with source citations.
landingFeature3Desc: Upload files and images easily. Includes canvas-based image downscaling and compression to optimize token consumption and performance.
landingFeature4Desc: Listen to response content read aloud line-by-line with parallel audio prefetching and automatic filter queues (code & thought blocks excluded).
landingMockUserMsg: Tell me about DeepSeek R1 and search the web for its release date.
landingMockThoughtBody: User is asking about DeepSeek R1 release date. Tavily returned Jan 20, 2025. Summarizing features: open-source, reasoning performance...
landingMockAssistantMsg: DeepSeek-R1 was officially released on January 20, 2025. It is a state-of-the-art open-source reasoning model developed by DeepSeek, featuring competitive performance on mathematics, code, and logic.
landingMockInputPlaceholder: Ask a question or type '/' for commands...

adminBackupRestoreDesc:
Export all upstream keys, client keys, and settings to a JSON file, or restore them from a previously exported JSON file.
Warning: Restoring will overwrite all existing keys and configurations.
